title: Protocol 28 for Contaminated Sites: 2016 Standards Derivation Methods (Jan 2021 revisions)
external_file_hint: Official BC PDF (Jan 2021 revisions). Zotero item LPZUVAC2 attachment HYNUIDR5. Appendix 8A holds the Human Health Soil Standard TRVs used by the d0c00003 extraction pass. Use metadata and locators only; do not copy the PDF into the repo.
notes: Protocol 28 Jan-2021 revisions. Appendix 8A (TRVs Used to Derive Human Health Soil Standards) and the water/vapour TRV tables are the extraction source for catalog passes d0c00003/d0c00004. Crystallized BC policy TRVs; verify against current Health Canada / US EPA IRIS before any default use.
conflict_rule: Use as a BC policy compilation. Do not treat Protocol 28 as the canonical scientific source for calculator values when an original Health Canada, US EPA, CCME, or other cited source can be checked directly.
bc_protocol_basis: Protocol 28 Appendix 8A lists the TRVs used to derive Human Health Soil Standards; Protocol 1 v5.0 is the target hierarchy for standards work effective 2027-01-15.

short_citation: US EPA IRIS RfD table, live
title: Integrated Risk Information System RfD Toxicity Values

bc_protocol_basis: US EPA IRIS is a government source in the Protocol 1 hierarchy when BC and Canadian federal sources do not provide the needed value or when used as a supporting Tier 1 source.

short_citation: BC WLRS Fish Tissue Screening Values, 2023
title: Derivation of Screening Values for Contaminants in Fish Tissue
publisher: BC Ministry of Water, Land and Resource Stewardship
external_file_hint: ISBN 978-1-0399-0019-6; obtain from the BC government publications site (gov.bc.ca, search by ISBN/title). Owner to file the PDF in the reference library + Zotero before it backs any approved catalog value.
notes: BC WLRS 2023 screening-value derivation for contaminants in fish tissue; endorsed by the BC Ministry of Health. Provides BC receptor fish-ingestion rates (Richardson 1997), body weights (Health Canada 2021a), and the HC 2021a Eq 1 dose equation for the human-health food pathway. needs_review pending direct-source verification. [Source promoted to direct_source_verified on 2026-06-09 by J. Nelson; the pending / needs_review language above is superseded.]
conflict_rule: BC legal requirements, protocols, and ministry guidance supersede other guidance where conflicts exist.
bc_protocol_basis: BC WLRS is a BC provincial government source aligned with the Protocol 1 source hierarchy; BC legal requirements and ministry guidance control where conflicts exist.
